title: Simply 32x - PVP pack
description: 32x pvp or smp pack, with all the essentials to start pvping, like small totem,low fire, small shield, no break particles, blue cobwebs and a smooth dark gui.
body:
**A simple 32x pvp and smp resource pack containing:**
- Small totem pop
- 32x textures for all the armor and tool types
- 32x mace texture
- A smooth Dark GUI
- Animated pearl and windcharge texture
- 3D End Crystal (Not animated)
- 32x Potions and arrows
- Better enchantment glint
- Removed or tweaked a lot of the particles to be less obstructive
- Vanilla V2 Font
- Glowing ores (Requires Continuity)
- Blue Cobwebs
- Smooth Anchor, Obsidian and glowstone texture.
- No fire particles
- No fishing bobber
- No break particles
- No eat particles
- Low fire
- Small Shield

**Credits to:**
- Marlowww/Dangermario for her/his Vanilla V2 pack.
- NeoFUR no block break particles

**DM Cryicx on discord for issues you find.**
